experiments: To find out effect of load on natural frequency of vibrations of a lever pin supported at one end carrying adjustable load on a vertical screwed bar and spring supported at some intermediate point (i) when the dead weight of rods is neglected and (ii) when their dead weight is taken into account.

To observe the phenomenon of ‘whirl’ in a horizontal light shaft and to determine the critical speed of the shaft.
To observe the mode shapes of a spring‑connected double pendulum and hence to demonstrate the phenomenon of beats.
To demonstrate the principle of a tuned undamped dynamic vibration absorber and to determine the effect of mass‑ratio (main and auxiliary mass) on the spread of the resulting natural frequencies.
To take measurements of sound pressure level (SPL) and to carry out octave‑band analysis of a machine using a noise level meter.
